column5:
I don't think this is actually my favorites list, but it's based on statistics.
For a director to qualify, I have to have seen at least 4 films from them. Placement is based off of average rating of all their movies, and the movie in this list is my favorite from each director. Okay? Okay.

column2: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
